Muhammad.1: Having sufficient time for my personal or home life is of utmost importance to me, as it allows for a healthy work-life balance and the opportunity to pursue personal interests and relationships.
Muhammad.2: Having a boss I can respect is of utmost importance to me because a respectful relationship fosters a positive work environment and encourages personal and professional growth.
Muhammad.3: Getting recognition for good performance is of utmost importance to me as it validates my hard work and motivates me to continue striving for excellence in my career.
Muhammad.4: Having security of employment is of utmost importance to me as it provides stability and peace of mind, allowing me to focus on my career growth and personal development without the constant worry of job loss.
Muhammad.5: Having pleasant people to work with is of utmost importance to me as a positive work environment fosters collaboration, creativity, and overall job satisfaction. Working alongside supportive and friendly colleagues can significantly enhance my daily experience and productivity.
Muhammad.6: Doing work that is interesting is of utmost importance to me because it keeps me engaged and motivated, allowing me to grow and develop my skills. An interesting job also enhances my overall job satisfaction and fulfillment.
Muhammad.7: Being consulted by my boss in decisions involving my work is of utmost importance to me as it fosters collaboration, ensures my input is valued, and enhances my job satisfaction.
Muhammad.8: Living in a desirable area is very important to me as it can significantly impact my quality of life and overall happiness, but it may not be the sole factor in choosing a job.
Muhammad.9: Having a job respected by my family and friends is of utmost importance to me, as their support and validation significantly influence my sense of self-worth and career satisfaction.
Muhammad.10: Having chances for promotion is of utmost importance to me as it reflects growth and development in my career, providing motivation to excel and achieve my professional goals.
Muhammad.11: Keeping time free for fun is very important to me as it helps maintain a balance between my studies and personal life, allowing me to recharge and enjoy life.
Muhammad.12: I believe moderation is important, as having fewer desires can lead to a more focused and content life, but I also value pursuing my interests and aspirations.
Muhammad.13: Doing a service to a friend is of utmost importance to me because I value friendship and believe in supporting those I care about. Helping friends strengthens our bond and fosters a sense of community.
Muhammad.14: Thrift is very important to me as a student, as managing my finances wisely allows me to allocate resources for essential needs and future investments in my education.
Muhammad.15: I sometimes feel nervous or tense, especially during exams or presentations, but it's not a constant feeling.
Muhammad.16: I usually find joy in my daily life, but there are moments when I feel less happy due to stress or challenges. Overall, I maintain a positive outlook.
Muhammad.17: Sometimes, there are occasions when my studies or other commitments limit my ability to pursue personal interests or activities I enjoy. However, I try to balance my time effectively.
Muhammad.18: I would describe my state of health as good. I generally feel well and maintain a balanced lifestyle, but I occasionally experience stress from my studies.
Muhammad.19: I feel very proud to be a citizen of Malaysia because of its rich cultural diversity and vibrant history. The sense of community and the beautiful landscapes also contribute to my pride in my country.
Muhammad.20: In my experience, it happens sometimes that subordinates or students may hesitate to contradict their boss or teacher due to fear of repercussions or judgment, but it varies depending on the individual and the environment.
Muhammad.21: I agree because a good manager can guide and support their team even if they don't have all the answers, fostering a collaborative environment where learning and problem-solving can occur.
Muhammad.22: I strongly agree because consistent effort often leads to improvement and success, regardless of the challenges faced. Persistence helps in overcoming obstacles and achieving goals.
Muhammad.23: I agree that having two bosses can create confusion and conflict in decision-making, but in some cases, it can also foster collaboration and diverse perspectives.
Muhammad.24: I agree that rules are important for maintaining order and consistency within an organization, but there may be exceptional circumstances where breaking a rule could lead to a better outcome for the organization.

Abdul.1: Having sufficient time for my personal or home life is of utmost importance to me, as it allows me to maintain a healthy work-life balance and spend quality time with my family.
Abdul.2: Having a boss I can respect is of utmost importance because it fosters a positive work environment and encourages professional growth. A respectful relationship with a superior can significantly impact job satisfaction and motivation.
Abdul.3: Getting recognition for good performance is of utmost importance to me as it validates my hard work and motivates me to continue performing at a high level. It also fosters a positive work environment and encourages teamwork.
Abdul.4: Job security is of utmost importance to me as it provides stability for my family and allows me to plan for the future without the constant worry of unemployment.
Abdul.5: Having pleasant people to work with is of utmost importance to me as a positive work environment greatly enhances job satisfaction and productivity. Good relationships with colleagues can make daily tasks more enjoyable and foster teamwork.
Abdul.6: Doing work that is interesting is of utmost importance to me as it keeps me engaged and motivated, making my job more fulfilling and enjoyable.
Abdul.7: Being consulted by my boss in decisions involving my work is of utmost importance to me as it fosters a sense of collaboration and ensures that my expertise is valued in the decision-making process.
Abdul.8: Living in a desirable area is very important to me as it can greatly affect my quality of life and overall happiness. A good environment can enhance both personal and professional experiences.
Abdul.9: Having a job respected by my family and friends is of utmost importance to me, as it reflects my values and the effort I put into my work, and it also influences how I feel about my own self-worth.
Abdul.10: Having chances for promotion is very important to me as it reflects growth and recognition in my career, motivating me to improve my skills and contribute more effectively.
Abdul.11: Keeping time free for fun is very important to me as it allows me to relax and enjoy life outside of work responsibilities. Balancing work and leisure is essential for my overall well-being.
Abdul.12: I believe moderation is important, but having some desires can motivate and enrich life. It's about finding a balance that works for me.
Abdul.13: Doing a service to a friend is of utmost importance to me because I value friendship and believe in supporting those I care about whenever they need help. It strengthens our bond and fosters a sense of community.
Abdul.14: Thrift is of utmost importance to me as it allows me to manage my finances effectively and save for future needs. Being careful with spending helps ensure that I can provide for my family and maintain a stable lifestyle.
Abdul.15: I sometimes feel nervous or tense, especially when facing tight deadlines or unexpected challenges at work. However, I generally manage to stay calm in most situations.
Abdul.16: I would say I am sometimes happy; there are moments of joy in my life, but also challenges that can affect my overall happiness.
Abdul.17: Sometimes, there are occasions when work commitments or family responsibilities can limit my ability to pursue personal interests or desires. However, I try to balance my time effectively.
Abdul.18: I would describe my state of health as fair; I have some minor health issues but nothing that significantly affects my daily life. I try to maintain a balanced lifestyle, but I do feel the effects of aging.
Abdul.19: I am very proud to be a citizen of Malaysia, as it is a diverse country with rich culture and traditions. I appreciate the opportunities and experiences that come with being part of this nation.
Abdul.20: In my experience, it is usually the case that subordinates are hesitant to contradict their boss, often due to fear of repercussions or a desire to maintain harmony in the workplace. This dynamic can also be observed in educational settings where students may feel intimidated by their teachers.
Abdul.21: I strongly agree because a good manager should focus on guiding and supporting their team rather than having all the answers, fostering a collaborative environment.
Abdul.22: I strongly agree because I believe that consistent hard work and determination often lead to achieving desired outcomes, especially in technical fields. Persistence helps overcome challenges and improves skills over time.
Abdul.23: I agree that having two bosses can create confusion and conflict in decision-making, but in some cases, it can also foster collaboration and innovation.
Abdul.24: I agree that rules are important for maintaining order and consistency within an organization, but there may be exceptional circumstances where breaking a rule could be justified for the greater good.

Nur.1: Having sufficient time for my personal or home life is of utmost importance to me, as it allows for a healthy work-life balance and the opportunity to nurture relationships and personal interests.
Nur.2: Having a boss I can respect is of utmost importance to me, as it fosters a positive work environment and encourages professional growth and collaboration. A respectful relationship with a superior can significantly impact job satisfaction and motivation.
Nur.3: Recognition for good performance is of utmost importance to me as it validates my efforts and motivates me to continue excelling in my work. Being acknowledged for my contributions fosters a positive work environment and enhances job satisfaction.
Nur.4: Security of employment is of utmost importance to me as it provides stability and peace of mind, allowing me to focus on my work without the constant worry of job loss.
Nur.5: Having pleasant people to work with is of utmost importance to me as a positive work environment fosters collaboration, creativity, and overall job satisfaction. Working alongside supportive and friendly colleagues can significantly enhance my daily experience and productivity.
Nur.6: Doing work that is interesting is of utmost importance to me as it keeps me engaged and motivated, allowing me to perform at my best and enjoy my professional life.
Nur.7: Being consulted by my boss in decisions involving my work is of utmost importance to me, as it fosters collaboration, ensures my input is valued, and enhances my job satisfaction.
Nur.8: Living in a desirable area is of utmost importance to me as it greatly affects my quality of life, access to amenities, and overall happiness. A pleasant environment can enhance both personal and professional experiences.
Nur.9: Having a job respected by my family and friends is of utmost importance to me, as it reflects my values and the impact I have on my community and loved ones. Their respect and support motivate me to strive for excellence in my career.
Nur.10: Having chances for promotion is of utmost importance to me as it reflects growth opportunities and recognition of my contributions in the workplace. It motivates me to perform better and strive for excellence in my career.
Nur.11: Keeping time free for fun is very important to me as it allows for relaxation and enjoyment, which are essential for a balanced life. I believe that having leisure time contributes to overall well-being and happiness.
Nur.12: I believe moderation is important, as it helps maintain balance in life, but I also value having aspirations and desires that drive personal growth and fulfillment.
Nur.13: Doing a service to a friend is of utmost importance to me as I value strong relationships and believe in supporting those I care about. Helping friends fosters trust and deepens our connections.
Nur.14: I believe being thrifty is very important as it helps in managing finances effectively and allows for savings for future needs or investments. It also promotes a more sustainable lifestyle by reducing unnecessary consumption.
Nur.15: I sometimes feel nervous or tense, especially in high-pressure situations or when facing new challenges. However, I generally manage to stay calm and composed.
Nur.16: I usually find joy in my daily life and appreciate the small moments, but like everyone, I have my ups and downs.
Nur.17: Sometimes, there are external factors or obligations that can hinder my ability to pursue my personal desires, but I generally find ways to balance them.
Nur.18: I feel very good overall, with no significant health issues and a balanced lifestyle that includes regular exercise and a healthy diet. My mental well-being is also strong, contributing to my overall health.
Nur.19: I feel very proud to be a citizen of Malaysia, as it is a diverse country with a rich culture and history. The sense of community and the opportunities available here contribute to my pride.
Nur.20: In my experience, it is usually the case that subordinates are hesitant to contradict their boss, often due to fear of repercussions or a desire to maintain harmony in the workplace. This dynamic can also be observed in educational settings where students may feel intimidated by their teachers.
Nur.21: I strongly agree because effective management involves guiding and supporting team members, rather than having all the answers. A good manager fosters an environment where questions can be explored collaboratively.
Nur.22: I strongly agree that persistent efforts are essential for achieving results, as consistent dedication often leads to success over time. Hard work and resilience can overcome many obstacles.
Nur.23: I agree that having two bosses can create confusion and conflict in decision-making, but in some cases, it can also foster collaboration and innovation.
Nur.24: I believe that while rules are important for maintaining order, there are situations where flexibility and critical thinking may lead to better outcomes for the organization. However, breaking rules should be approached with caution and proper justification.

Siti.1: Having sufficient time for my personal or home life is of utmost importance to me, as it allows me to balance work with family responsibilities and personal interests.
Siti.2: Having a boss I can respect is of utmost importance as it fosters a positive work environment and encourages personal and professional growth. A respectful relationship with a superior can significantly impact job satisfaction and motivation.
Siti.3: Getting recognition for good performance is of utmost importance to me as it validates my hard work and motivates me to continue performing well in my job.
Siti.4: Having security of employment is of utmost importance to me as it provides stability and peace of mind for my future and my family's well-being.
Siti.5: Having pleasant people to work with is of utmost importance to me as a positive work environment greatly enhances job satisfaction and overall well-being. Good relationships with colleagues can lead to better teamwork and a more enjoyable work experience.
Siti.6: Doing work that is interesting is of utmost importance to me as it keeps me engaged and motivated, making my work experience more fulfilling.
Siti.7: Being consulted by my boss in decisions involving my work is of utmost importance to me as it fosters a sense of value and collaboration, ensuring that my input is considered in the workplace.
Siti.8: Living in a desirable area is very important to me as it contributes to my overall quality of life and well-being. A pleasant environment can enhance my job satisfaction and personal happiness.
Siti.9: Having a job respected by my family and friends is of utmost importance to me, as it reflects my values and the way I contribute to society. Their respect and support would greatly enhance my sense of fulfillment and pride in my work.
Siti.10: Having chances for promotion is very important to me as it reflects growth and recognition in my career, providing motivation to improve my skills and contribute more effectively.
Siti.11: Keeping time free for fun is very important to me as it allows me to relax and enjoy life, which is essential for my overall well-being. Balancing work and leisure helps me maintain a positive outlook.
Siti.12: I believe having few desires can lead to a simpler and more content life, but I also value some aspirations that motivate me. It's a balance between wanting and being satisfied.
Siti.13: Doing a service to a friend is of utmost importance to me as I value friendship and believe in supporting those I care about. Helping friends strengthens our bond and creates a sense of community.
Siti.14: Thrift is of utmost importance to me as it helps me manage my limited resources effectively and ensures that I can provide for my family and save for the future.
Siti.15: I sometimes feel nervous or tense, especially when facing new challenges or during busy periods at work. However, I manage to cope with it most of the time.
Siti.16: I would say I am sometimes happy, as life has its ups and downs, but I try to find joy in small things.
Siti.17: Sometimes, there are occasions when my responsibilities or the expectations of others can limit my ability to pursue my own desires. However, I try to find a balance when I can.
Siti.18: I would describe my state of health as fair. I have some minor health issues that I manage, but overall, I can still carry out my daily activities.
Siti.19: I am very proud to be a citizen of Malaysia because of its rich culture, diversity, and the beautiful landscapes we have. I appreciate the sense of community and the opportunities available here.
Siti.20: In my experience, it is usually the case that subordinates are hesitant to contradict their boss due to fear of repercussions or negative judgment. This dynamic can create a challenging work environment where open communication is stifled.
Siti.21: I agree because a good manager can guide and support their team even if they don't have all the answers, fostering a collaborative environment.
Siti.22: I strongly agree because I believe that consistent hard work and determination often lead to achieving desired outcomes in both personal and professional life.
Siti.23: I agree that having two bosses can create confusion and conflict in decision-making, but in some cases, it may also foster collaboration and diverse perspectives.
Siti.24: I agree that rules are important for maintaining order and consistency within an organization, but there may be exceptional circumstances where breaking a rule could be justified for the greater good.
